title: Pepee's Things
description: BTA mod adding random things I came up with.
body:
**This mod is for a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3!**  
**Requires HalpLibe 5.4**  
*Multiplayer was briefly tested, but there may be bugs*
## Pepee Things
This mod adds some things without certain theme in mind.
# Features (Release 1.2)
### Mining Hammers
New 3x3 mining tool. It has mining speed reduced by 20% compared to pickaxe, but each use takes only 2 durability. There are no wooden hammers.
### Carrots, potatoes and tomatoes
Hoe grass to get new seeds. Make soups, sandwiches and more with these new ingredients.
### Sickles
New grass/crops/leaves breaking tool. Breaks only mature crops. Better materials have bigger breaking range (up to 9x9x3).
### Colored Glass
Make colored glass by dyeing it in crafting or painting glass blocks with paintbrush.
### Chisels
Right click on stone blocks to carve them into other variants _(new modded variants soon)_. Allows to obtain double slabs as one block. Steel Chisel is unbreakable.
### Chains
Work similar to ropes, but can't be picked up by right clicking. Go well with lanterns.
### Ball of Moss
Use bonemeal on mossy stones to get some balls of moss. Use them on cobblestone, oak log and normal stones to make them mossy. Bonemealing mossy cobble, logs and bricks won't give you moss. Bypasses that light level requirement and makes mossy blocks more renewable
### Catching Net
Right click chickens to catch and move them around!
